arts.sum: Parma are coming off a 1-0 defeat to Udinese last weekend, which was also their fourth in a row on the road. Torino will be aiming for their third win in a row after defeating Monza 2-0 last Sunday, ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Parma vs. Torino - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Serie A clash between Parma and Torino, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
